title: Mac Mini Shortage Sparks eBay Price Surge Amid AI Demand
summary: Apple's Mac Mini is sold out and resellers are marking up prices on eBay. The compact desktop is in high demand for running local AI models and tools.
body:
Apple’s Mac Mini is sold out across major retailers, driving a surge in marked-up eBay listings. Resellers are capitalizing on the shortage, with prices soaring well above the $599 retail price. The compact desktop has become a favorite for running local AI models and tools, thanks to its balance of power and portability.

The shortage highlights the growing demand for compact, powerful hardware to run AI workloads locally. The Mac Mini’s M2 chip provides a cost-effective alternative to larger workstations, making it ideal for developers and hobbyists. This trend mirrors the GPU shortages of 2020-2021, where AI researchers and cryptocurrency miners drove up prices.

Apple has not announced a new Mac Mini model, leaving the current M2 version as the only option. This could prolong the shortage as demand continues to outstrip supply. Resellers are likely to keep prices high until Apple releases a new model or increases production. The situation underscores the broader challenge of meeting hardware demand in the AI boom.
